creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your patch.

Updated with minor modifications:

- Adjustments to make it build on 9.x (use gcc on 9.x)
- USE_GITHUB does not need MASTER_SITES to be defined in the Makefile
- Minor style modifications

kib, the port is currently unmaintained, would you be interested in becoming its maintainer?
